title: Excluding holidays from project timelines
excerpt: Please add the ability to exclude holidays/non-work days from timelines.  I need to be able to add our company’s holidays into the system.  I then need to be able to adjust timelines and have our holidays accounted for a…

posts.author: rclark6071 (Russell Clark)
posts.cookedHtml: Please add the ability to exclude holidays/non-work days from timelines. I need to be able to add our company’s holidays into the system. I then need to be able to adjust timelines and have our holidays accounted for automatically. Excel can do this, monday.com cannot. Thank you!

posts.author: KirbyNWGE (Josalynn)
posts.cookedHtml: This definitely needs more attention and consideration. It’d be nice if the dates could include all days in between so it can export to Google or Outlook Calendar correctly, but when the day count shows, it would show WORK DAYS and not all days. Especially when it comes to vacation/PTO schedule. That way us payroll/HR people can look and see a person has the 1st to the 14th off, but really it’s only 10 working days - we don’t want weekends/holidays counted.

posts.author: jane.sullivan (Jane Sullivan)
posts.cookedHtml: This platform cannot compete with the likes of Smartsheet until this functionality becomes available.

posts.author: Cotters (Martin Cottingham)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m guessing that this has never been acted on, I can’t change the working time of a plan & I really need to. This is basic PM.

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Cotters,

You can acheive this using the Date Check app.
Here is a demo of how.
You can also create holidays for users in your monday account. Here is a demo of how.

If you need any help with the app, you can always reach out at support@kolaai.com

posts.author: jcullar (Joshua)
posts.cookedHtml: This is still needed. Cant believe this isnt offered. Everyone everywhere has holidays and days they dont work.

posts.author: ATFordXIII (Aaron Ford)
posts.cookedHtml: I noticed from the demo it can skip past individual dates, when the date is entered in the date column that aligns with an individual date or range in the holiday table. Can it also extend “timeline” column. So if my date range included a holiday in the middle it would extend the timeline by x number of days falling on the holiday / holiday range.

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @ATFordXIII ,

Yes, the app can do that. The process is the same as it is for date columns. You can give it a try.

posts.author: Michaleiba (Michal Leiba)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I am Michal from the spot-nik team. Yesterday we launched a new app- SuperPlanner. I believe it answers your needs. I wonder if this is still relevant for you, but here it is-

https://auth.monday.com/oauth2/authorize?client_id=a72397016954aa33e272936988566142&response_type=install

Let me know what you think
